heading: Restrictions
label: 30906 Restrictions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090636:24 (words after semicolon).(words after semicolon), .June 15, 1916, ch. 148, § 439 Stat. 228The words “certificates of” and “its object and purposes being solely of a benevolent character” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090636:24 (words after semicolon).(words after semicolon), .June 15, 1916, ch. 148, § 439 Stat. 228The words “certificates of” and “its object and purposes being solely of a benevolent character” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Profit
children.label: a .—Profit
children.text: The corporation may not operate for pecuniary profit to its members.

children.heading: .—Stocks and Dividends
children.label: b .—Stocks and Dividends
children.text: The corporation may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.
